intake_questions.text: Which ISO 27002:2022 control domains are in scope for this review?
Does the organisation have a current Statement of Applicability (SoA)?
Has an internal audit been conducted against ISO 27002 in the last 12 months?
Is the organisation seeking ISO 27001 certification as a follow-on objective?
Are any controls excluded from scope? If so, please provide business justification.

scope_template.prompt: Identify business units and sites in scope for this control review
List information assets and systems against which controls will be assessed
Document excluded controls with approved justifications

requirements.text: Information security roles and responsibilities (27002-5.2) must be formally defined, allocated, and communicated to relevant personnel.
requirements.evidence_expectation: RACI chart or role matrix; CISO/security role appointment records; job descriptions

requirements.text: Legal, regulatory and contractual requirements (27002-5.31) relevant to information security must be identified, documented, and maintained current.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Legal and regulatory requirements register; compliance calendar; contractual obligation tracker

requirements.text: Privileged access rights (27002-8.2) must be restricted, managed through a formal approval process, and reviewed periodically.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Privileged account register; PAM solution evidence; access review results; approval workflow records

requirements.text: Data leakage prevention measures (27002-8.12) must be applied to systems processing sensitive information with evidence of tuning and response to alerts.
requirements.evidence_expectation: DLP tool configuration; DLP coverage matrix; alert response records; incident evidence

requirements.text: Monitoring activities (27002-8.16) must be established covering networks, systems, and applications with appropriate alerting and response procedures.
requirements.evidence_expectation: SIEM deployment evidence; monitoring coverage matrix; alerting runbooks; sample alert resolution tickets

evidence_requests.title: Security Roles and Responsibilities Documentation
evidence_requests.description: RACI chart or equivalent; security appointment letters; job descriptions with IS responsibilities

evidence_requests.title: Legal and Regulatory Requirements Register
evidence_requests.description: Current legal register with GDPR/DPDP and other applicable requirements; compliance calendar

evidence_requests.title: Privileged Access Management Evidence
evidence_requests.description: Privileged account listing; PAM tool evidence; access review results from last quarter

evidence_requests.title: DLP Configuration and Alert Evidence
evidence_requests.description: DLP tool configuration covering email, endpoint, and cloud; sample alert logs and response records

evidence_requests.title: Security Monitoring Coverage Evidence
evidence_requests.description: SIEM configuration; monitoring coverage matrix showing asset coverage; sample alert investigation records

task_templates.title: Assess security roles, responsibilities, and segregation of duties
Review legal and regulatory requirements register for currency
Evaluate privileged access management controls and review cadence
Assess DLP coverage and effectiveness across email, endpoint, cloud
Evaluate security monitoring coverage and alerting quality
Interview SOC or security operations team on monitoring processes
Map current controls against ISO 27002:2022 Annex A requirements

finding_templates.title_pattern: Information security role undefined or unallocated: {role_name}
Regulatory requirement not captured in legal register: {requirement}
Privileged access not reviewed within required period: {system}

severity_model.critical: Control completely absent; immediate exploitation risk or regulatory breach likely
severity_model.high: Significant control weakness; exploitation or non-compliance probable without remediation
severity_model.medium: Partial control implementation; remediation required within 90 days
severity_model.low: Minor control gap; best-practice improvement; 6-month remediation window
severity_model.informational: Enhancement observation with no direct control failure

advisory_clinic_templates.title: Privileged Access Management Advisory
advisory_clinic_templates.guidance: Review PAM tooling options; guide implementation of just-in-time privileged access

advisory_clinic_templates.title: SIEM Tuning Workshop
advisory_clinic_templates.guidance: Review detection rules against MITRE ATT&CK; prioritise high-fidelity alerting for critical assets

advisory_clinic_templates.title: DLP Implementation Advisory
advisory_clinic_templates.guidance: Map sensitive data flows; recommend DLP policies by data category and channel
